question_tagalog: Ano ang first impression mo sakin na hindi pala totoo?
question_english: What was your first impression of me that turned out to be untrue?
quote_tagalog: Magkaiba ang tingin sa pagkakakilala.
quote_english: What you see is different from what you know.

question_tagalog: May ex ka ba na iniistalk mo parin paminsan-minsan?
question_english: Do you have an ex that you still stalk occasionally?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang space ang nakaraan dito.
quote_english: There's no space for the past here.

question_tagalog: Sino sa mga kaibigan ko ang secretly hindi mo masyadong gusto?
question_english: Who among my friends do you secretly not like that much?
quote_tagalog: Maiintindihan ko kahit sino man yan.
quote_english: I will understand no matter who it is.

question_tagalog: Anong habit ko ang pinaka-nakakainis na hindi mo masabi sakin?
question_english: What habit of mine is the most annoying that you can't tell me?
quote_tagalog: Pasensya na sa mga bad habits ko.
quote_english: Sorry for my bad habits.

question_tagalog: Ano ang pinakamalaking white lie na sinabi mo sakin?
question_english: What is the biggest white lie you told me?
quote_tagalog: Ang katotohanan ang magpapalaya sa tiwala.
quote_english: The truth will free the trust.

question_tagalog: Naisip mo na bang magloko kahit mabilis lang na thought?
question_english: Have you ever thought of cheating even as a fleeting thought?
quote_tagalog: Sana ako lang at wala nang iba.
quote_english: I hope it's just me and no one else.

question_tagalog: Alin sa mga gifts ko sayo ang palihim mong hindi nagustuhan?
question_english: Which of my gifts to you did you secretly dislike?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin mo ang totoo, hindi ako magagalit.
quote_english: Tell the truth, I won't get mad.

question_tagalog: May time ba na pinagsisihan mong naging tayo?
question_english: Was there a time you regretted us getting together?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang desisyon na hindi ko pinagsisihan.
quote_english: You are the only decision I don't regret.

question_tagalog: Sino sa mga naging crush mo noon ang naiisip mo parin minsan?
question_english: Who among your past crushes do you still think about sometimes?
quote_tagalog: Wala akong pake sa past, akin ka naman ngayon.
quote_english: I don't care about the past, you're mine now.

question_tagalog: May outfit ba ako na tuwang-tuwa ako pero cringe na cringe ka?
question_english: Do I have an outfit that I love but makes you cringe?
quote_tagalog: Suportahan nalang kahit baduy minsan.
quote_english: Just be supportive even if it's unstylish sometimes.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na parang gusto mo na makipag-break?
question_english: When did you feel like you wanted to break up?
quote_tagalog: Pagusapan natin bago bumitaw.
quote_english: Let's talk before letting go.

question_tagalog: Iniisip mo ba minsan kung ano ang buhay mo kung single ka pa rin?
question_english: Do you sometimes think what your life would be if you were still single?
quote_tagalog: Mas masaya ako dahil nandito ka.
quote_english: I am happier because you are here.

question_tagalog: May sikreto ka ba na natatakot kang sabihin sakin?
question_english: Do you have a secret that you are afraid to tell me?
quote_tagalog: Tanggap kita, kahit ano pa yan.
quote_english: I accept you, whatever it is.

question_tagalog: Sinong tao ang palihim mong pinagseselosan hindi ko lang alam?
question_english: Which person are you secretly jealous of without me knowing?
quote_tagalog: Wala kang dapat ikaselos, mahal.
quote_english: You have nothing to be jealous of, love.

question_tagalog: Ano yung promise mo sakin na alam mong hindi mo matutupad?
question_english: What was the promise you made to me that you know you can't keep?
quote_tagalog: Okay lang basta honest ka palagi.
quote_english: It's fine as long as you're always honest.

question_tagalog: Nagsinungaling ka ba sa family mo para lang makasama ako?
question_english: Did you ever lie to your family just to be with me?
quote_tagalog: Wag natin sanayin, pero na-appreciate ko.
quote_english: Let's not make it a habit, but I appreciate it.

question_tagalog: May ugali ba ako na ginagaya mo lang para hindi tayo mag-away?
question_english: Is there a trait of mine you just copy to avoid arguments?
quote_tagalog: Maging totoo tayo sa sarili natin.
quote_english: Let's be true to ourselves.

question_tagalog: Kailan yung time na naiinis ka na sakin pero nag-pretend ka na okay lang?
question_english: When was the time you were annoyed at me but pretended it was fine?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin agad para maayos natin.
quote_english: Say it right away so we can fix it.

question_tagalog: Ano ang the most embarrassing truth mo na ngayon mo lang aaminin?
question_english: What is your most embarrassing truth that you'll only admit now?
quote_tagalog: Safe environment tayo, huwag kang mahiya.
quote_english: We're in a safe environment, don't be shy.

question_tagalog: Have you ever doubted our future together?
question_english: Have you ever doubted our future together?
quote_tagalog: Normal lang matakot, pero lalaban tayo.
quote_english: It's normal to be afraid, but we'll fight.

question_tagalog: Anong pagkain na niluto ko ang as in hindi masarap pero kinain mo parin?
question_english: What food did I cook that was genuinely bad but you ate anyway?
quote_tagalog: Na-appreciate ko ang effort mo kahit papano.
quote_english: I appreciated your effort somehow.

question_tagalog: May friend ba ako na feeling mo bad influence sakin?
question_english: Do I have a friend that you feel is a bad influence on me?
quote_tagalog: Ako na bahala mag-filter ng tropa ko.
quote_english: I'll handle filtering my friends.

question_tagalog: Naging pabigat ba ako sa buhay mo at some point?
question_english: Did I become a burden in your life at some point?
quote_tagalog: Willing akong mag-adjust para sayo.
quote_english: I am willing to adjust for you.

question_tagalog: May physical insecurity ka ba na tinatago mo sakin?
question_english: Do you have a physical insecurity you hide from me?
quote_tagalog: Kahit ano pang itsura mo, mahal kita.
quote_english: No matter how you look, I love you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ide-describe ang relasyon natin sa pinaka-brutal na paraan?
question_english: How would you describe our relationship in the most brutal way?
quote_tagalog: Masakit man ang totoo, at least totoo.
quote_english: The truth might hurt, but at least it's the truth.

question_tagalog: Sino sa pamilya ko ang medyo iniiwasan mo palagi?
question_english: Who in my family do you tend to avoid?
quote_tagalog: Intindihin nalang natin sila para walang gulo.
quote_english: Let's just understand them to avoid trouble.

question_tagalog: Anong bagay ang ginagawa ko in bed na palihim mong ayaw?
question_english: What is something I do in bed that you secretly dislike?
quote_tagalog: Communication is key kahit sa intimate acts.
quote_english: Communication is key even in intimate acts.

question_tagalog: Pinagpanggap mo ba minsan na nag-e-enjoy ka sa hobbies ko?
question_english: Did you ever pretend to enjoy my hobbies?
quote_tagalog: Okay lang kung di mo trip, basta honest ka.
quote_english: It's fine if it's not your thing, as long as you're honest.

question_tagalog: Naiinggit ka ba minsan sa ibang couples na kilala natin?
question_english: Do you sometimes get jealous of other couples we know?
quote_tagalog: Tayo lang, sapat na.
quote_english: Just us is enough.

question_tagalog: Ano ang biggest mistake mo sa relationship natin so far?
question_english: What is your biggest mistake in our relationship so far?
quote_tagalog: Lahat naman nagkakamali basta bumabawi.
quote_english: Everyone makes mistakes as long as we make up for it.

question_tagalog: Ginawa mo na ba akong excuse para lang makaiwas sa isang lakad?
question_english: Have you ever used me as an excuse just to avoid a gathering?
quote_tagalog: Okay lang, support kita dyan.
quote_english: It's fine, I support you on that.

question_tagalog: Ano sa tingin mo ang reason kung bakit tayo magbe-break kung sakali?
question_english: What do you think is the reason we would break up if ever?
quote_tagalog: Dapat iwasan na natin yang rason na yan.
quote_english: We should already avoid that reason.

question_tagalog: Pag nag-aaway tayo, naisip mo ba minsan kung tama pa ba to?
question_english: When we argue, do you sometimes think if this is still right?
quote_tagalog: Huwag kang bibitaw kahit mahirap.
quote_english: Don't let go even if it's hard.

question_tagalog: May nabasa ka ba sa phone ko na hindi ko alam na nakita mo?
question_english: Did you read something on my phone that I don't know you saw?
quote_tagalog: Walang privacy na nilalabag, tiwala lang.
quote_english: No privacy being violated, just trust.

question_tagalog: Nag-judge ka ba ng financial decisions ko noon?
question_english: Did you judge my financial decisions before?
quote_tagalog: Magtulungan tayo sa pag-grow ng ipon.
quote_english: Let's help each other grow our savings.

question_tagalog: Ano ang opinion mo sa career path ko, the honest truth?
question_english: What is your opinion on my career path, the honest truth?
quote_tagalog: I support you kahit anong mangyari.
quote_english: I support you no matter what happens.

question_tagalog: Nahihiya ka ba paminsan-minsan pag kasama mo ako sa public?
question_english: Are you sometimes embarrassed when you're with me in public?
quote_tagalog: Wala akong pake sa sasabihin ng iba.
quote_english: I don't care what others say.

question_tagalog: Anong ugali ko ang pinaka-toxic sa paningin mo?
question_english: What trait of mine is the most toxic in your eyes?
quote_tagalog: Tinatanggal ko na yung toxicity for you.
quote_english: I'm removing the toxicity for you.

question_tagalog: Nag-iba ba tingin mo sakin the first time we got intimate?
question_english: Did your perception of me change the first time we got intimate?
quote_tagalog: Mas deeply connected na tayo ngayon.
quote_english: We are more deeply connected now.

question_tagalog: May expectation ka ba sa akin nung una na na-disappoint ka in reality?
question_english: Did you have an expectation of me at first that disappointed you in reality?
quote_tagalog: Realistic love na ang meron tayo.
quote_english: We have realistic love now.

question_tagalog: Nagsawa ka na ba sakin sa tagal na nating magkasama?
question_english: Have you ever gotten tired of me in all the time we've been together?
quote_tagalog: Pipiliin parin kita kahit boring na.
quote_english: I will still choose you even if it gets boring.

question_tagalog: Sino ang the 'one that got away' mo bago ako?
question_english: Who is your 'one that got away' before me?
quote_tagalog: Ako na ang the 'one that will stay'.
quote_english: I am the 'one that will stay'.

question_tagalog: Kung hindi tayo nag-meet, nasa anong sitwasyon ka kaya ngayon?
question_english: If we never met, what situation do you think you'd be in now?
quote_tagalog: Destiny na nagkatagpo tayo sa tamang panahon.
quote_english: It's destiny we met at the right time.

question_tagalog: Tinanggi mo na ba ako sa ibang tao na interested sayo?
question_english: Have you ever denied me to other people interested in you?
quote_tagalog: Ipagmalaki mo naman ako sa mundo.
quote_english: Be proud of me to the world.

question_tagalog: May post ba akong pinandirihan mo talaga sa social media ko?
question_english: Is there a post of mine on social media that you really cringed at?
quote_tagalog: Tanggapin mo na ang jeje phase ko.
quote_english: Just accept my cringe phase.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin na sa tingin mo hindi mo mababago kahit kelan?
question_english: Is there a part of me you think you can never change?
quote_tagalog: Mahalin natin ang mga flaws ng isa't isa.
quote_english: Let's love each other's flaws.

question_tagalog: Kailan ko napa-feel sayo na hindi ako nakikinig sayo?
question_english: When did I make you feel like I wasn't listening to you?
quote_tagalog: Sorry na kung lutang ako minsan.
quote_english: Sorry if I space out sometimes.

question_tagalog: May time ba na feeling mo you deserve better than me?
question_english: Was there a time you felt you deserve better than me?
quote_tagalog: I will be the better person you deserve.
quote_english: I will be the better person you deserve.

question_tagalog: Tingin mo ba talaga equal tayo nag-e-effort sa relasyon na ito?
question_english: Do you really think we put equal effort into this relationship?
quote_tagalog: Hayaan mong bumawi ako sayo.
quote_english: Let me make it up to you.

question_tagalog: Anong advice ng friends mo tungkol sakin na hindi mo pinakinggan?
question_english: What advice from your friends about me did you not listen to?
quote_tagalog: Tayo lang ang nakakaalam kung ano ang totoo.
quote_english: Only we know what is real.

question_tagalog: Bakit nahihirapan ka mag-apologize paminsan sakin?
question_english: Why do you find it hard to apologize to me sometimes?
quote_tagalog: Ibaba ang pride para sa relasyon natin.
quote_english: Lower the pride for our relationship.

question_tagalog: May sinabi ba akong joke na hanggang ngayon na-o-offend ka parin?
question_english: Did I say a joke that still offends you until now?
quote_tagalog: Sensitibo ako in a way na di mo napapansin.
quote_english: I'm sensitive in a way you don't notice.

question_tagalog: Kung maghihiwalay tayo, kanino ka unang tatakbo for comfort?
question_english: If we break up, who would you run to first for comfort?
quote_tagalog: Wag naman sanang umabot sa ganoon.
quote_english: I hope it never reaches that point.

question_tagalog: Totoo ba ang reason mo the first time na nag-cancel ka ng date natin?
question_english: Was your reason true the first time you canceled our date?
quote_tagalog: Aamin na ako sa mga excuses ko noon.
quote_english: I will admit my excuses before.

question_tagalog: Feeling mo ba palagi ikaw ang the 'bigger person' sa away natin?
question_english: Do you feel like you are always the 'bigger person' in our fights?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko pareho tayong nag-o-own ng mistakes.
quote_english: I want us both to own our mistakes.

question_tagalog: Sa tingin mo rin ba medyo toxic yung pagmamahal mo sakin?
question_english: Do you also think your love for me is a bit toxic?
quote_tagalog: Ang intense kasi ng love natin sometimes.
quote_english: Our love is so intense sometimes.

question_tagalog: Aaminin mo ba that you sometimes miss the thrill of being single?
question_english: Will you admit that you sometimes miss the thrill of being single?
quote_tagalog: Pero the peace you give is better than the thrill.
quote_english: But the peace you give is better than the thrill.

question_tagalog: Ano ang the most hurtful thing na pumasok sa isip mo tungkol sakin?
question_english: What is the most hurtful thing that crossed your mind about me?
quote_tagalog: Intrusive thoughts lang yon, hindi yun totoo.
quote_english: It's just intrusive thoughts, it's not true.

question_tagalog: Nakinig ka ba talaga kanina nung nagkukwento ako, or nag-zone out ka?
question_english: Were you really listening earlier when I was talking, or did you zone out?
quote_tagalog: Sorry, lutang lang talaga ako minsan paano ba to.
quote_english: Sorry, I really space out sometimes, how do we fix this.

question_tagalog: Kung may isang truth na pwede mong tanggalin sa past natin, ano yon?
question_english: If there's one truth you could erase from our past, what would it be?
quote_tagalog: Yung nakaraan ang nagbuo kung sino tayo ngayon.
quote_english: The past shaped who we are today.
